name: Thessaly Almond Cookies

ingredients.item: In a mixing bowl, beat the sugars, butter, cocoa and extracts until creamy.
Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
Combine the baking soda and flour.
Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls 2 inch apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake at 380 degrees F for 8-10 minutes or until edges are firm.
Remove to wire racks to cool.
